fields.field_label: This declaration is attached to (form name/number)

guidance.en: Identify which form this declaration supports. Example: 'FL-300, Request for Order' or 'DV-100, Request for DVRO'. This tells the court what motion or request your declaration accompanies.
guidance.es: Identifique a cuál formulario se adjunta esta declaración.

guidance.en: Write your sworn statement of facts. Number each paragraph. State only facts within your personal knowledge. Be specific: include dates, times, locations, names, and what you personally witnessed or experienced. Everything you write is under penalty of perjury.
guidance.es: Escriba su declaración jurada de hechos. Numere cada párrafo.

common_errors.en: Including hearsay, opinions, or legal arguments. Declarations must contain facts, not conclusions.

tips.en: Use chronological order. Start each paragraph with 'On [date], I [observed/did/experienced]...' This is the most persuasive format for judges.
tips.es: Use chronological order. Start each paragraph with 'On [date], I [observed/did/experienced]...' This is the most persuasive format for judges.

guidance.en: Sign and date your declaration. The signature block reads: 'I declare under penalty of perjury under the laws of the State of California that the foregoing is true and correct.' Making false statements is punishable under Penal Code § 118.
guidance.es: Firme y feche su declaración bajo pena de perjurio.
